response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience and current tenure at Stripe — drastically overqualified for an entry-level fullstack role. While the technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL-adjacent SQL) align well, the seniority mismatch creates high risk of compensation misalignment, retention issues, and dissatisfaction with junior-scoped work. Berlin-based, which fits the on-site requirement, but the role's growth trajectory offers little to someone at this career stage.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across Stripe, Shopify, RIDE Capital
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
Berlin-based, meeting the on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to entry-level role
High flight risk and likely compensation mismatch
No clear motivation shown for downshift into renewable energy / construction tech
